activation_boundary: Only the public V3 install-check, public-repository workflows, public answer-envelope modules, active KNOWLEDGE-R17 rights objects, and R17 repository packets may participate in formal runs.
mutation_policy: Historical run and installation objects are preserved byte-for-byte. Legacy code, topology and R16 installation receipts remain audit-only and cannot satisfy a formal gate.
removal_policy: A quarantined path may leave this manifest only after its obsolete topology or release assumptions are removed and replacement tests pass.
